name: Lemon Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Nuts, walnuts, pecans, etc., chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients (except those for glaze) together in the order given.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased loaf pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
4. After removing from the oven, glaze the top with the mixture of powdered sugar and lemon juice while the bread is still hot.
5. Serves 8 to 10. Excellent for a brunch or teatime.
